# g13d

NixOS module wrapping `g13d` (Logitech G13 daemon) as a managed systemd service, with declarative config and a tmpfiles-provisioned pipe directory.

## Contents

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| [default.nix](./default.nix) | Declares `services.g13d` options and systemd service; sources package from `../../pkgs/g13d`. |

## Architecture / Data Flow

1. `services.g13d.enable` gates the entire module via `mkEnableOption`.
2. `services.g13d.config` (type `lib.types.lines`) is serialized to a Nix store path via `pkgs.writeText` → `g13d.bind`.
3. `systemd.tmpfiles` creates `/run/g13d` (mode `0777`, owned `root`) before service start.
4. `ExecStart` launches `g13d --config <store-path> --pipe_in /run/g13d/g13-0 --pipe_out /run/g13d/g13-0_out`.

## Configuration

| Option | Type | Default | Effect |
|--------|------|---------|--------|
| `services.g13d.enable` | `mkEnableOption` | `false` | Activates module |
| `services.g13d.config` | `lib.types.lines` | `""` | Written to `g13d.bind` config file |

## File Relationships

- Package definition lives in [`pkgs/g13d/`](../../pkgs/g13d/) — `default.nix` here references it as `../../pkgs/g13d`.
- Module registered in parent aggregator [`modules/default.nix`](../default.nix).
